description: Annual-average MXN/USD exchange rate, used to derive the USD column of inegi.csc_comercio. NOT an INEGI figure — a documented convenience series.
source: World Bank Open Data PA.NUS.FCRF (Official exchange rate, LCU per US$, period average; IMF IFS) — transcribed 2026-05-22, re-verify before publication use
